case_title: COLEMAN MAHER VS. MOHAMMED GAFAR MALIK ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF MAHER, COLEMAN AS TO DEFENDANT MALIK, MOHAMMED GAFAR
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) (NO COPY TO CONFORM)
